underlying_goal: Optimize Claude Code settings for developer productivity based on the latest changelog, then fix scrollback behavior so terminal content stays visible when scrolling
friction_detail: The fullscreen TUI setting Claude applied broke terminal scrollback, requiring a revert after the initial fix attempt failed and an edit was denied in dontAsk mode.
brief_summary: User wanted productivity-optimized settings plus working scroll behavior; settings were applied and the scrollback issue was diagnosed and fixed, though it required a restart to take effect.
